description_long: This sculpture features a serene, contemplative female figure carved in a classical style, emerging from the top of a tall, rectangular pedestal. The figure is depicted with her head bowed and hands gently clasped, evoking a sense of reflection or mourning. The pedestal is inscribed with the word 'WISH' on its front face, adding a poetic or memorial element to the piece. The sculpture is rendered in a pale stone material, with subtle weathering and discoloration visible, especially on the sides and back. The base of the pedestal is surrounded by a patch of grass, suggesting an outdoor installation. The overall form is monolithic and vertical, with the figure seamlessly integrated into the pedestal.
description: A contemplative female figure carved in pale stone rises from a tall pedestal inscribed with 'WISH', set on a grassy base. The sculpture exudes a sense of reflection and solemnity.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bowed female figure and the 'WISH' inscription clearly on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the figure and the depth of the pedestal, with visible weathering.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the figure and pedestal, with more pronounced discoloration and moss at the base.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the figure's profile and the clean, pale stone surface of the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: contemplative female figure on a pedestal
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a patch of grass, likely in a park or cemetery setting.
